json.name: taskBreakdown
implementationPlan
validationPlan
rollbackPlan

parameters.jsCode:
const forbiddenActions = [
  'Do not expose API keys or credentials',
  'Do not run destructive git or shell commands without explicit human approval',
  'Do not auto-deploy to production',
  'Do not assume a direct Codex API exists'
];

const testCommands = [
  'git status',
  'git diff',
  'Run project-specific validation commands after inspecting the repo'
];

const codexTaskPrompt = $json.mode === 'prepare_codex_task'
  ? [
      '# Codex Task',
      '',
      `## 背景`,
      `项目：${$json.projectName}`,
      `目标：${$json.goal}`,
      '',
      '## 修改范围',
      ...($json.taskBreakdown || []).map((item) => `- ${item}`),
      '',
      '## 禁止事项',
      ...forbiddenActions.map((item) => `- ${item}`),
      '',
      '## 验收标准',
      ...($json.acceptanceCriteria || []).map((item) => `- ${item}`),
      '',
      '## 测试命令 / 验证动作',
      ...testCommands.map((item) => `- ${item}`),
      '',
      '## 回滚方案',
      ...($json.rollbackPlan || []).map((item) => `- ${item}`),
      '',
      '## Git 提交建议',
      '- 建议先完成小步修改并人工查看 diff，再决定是否提交',
      '- 建议提交信息：feat: prepare safe codex task workflow iteration',
      '',
      '## 任务承载方式',
      '- 当前不假设存在 Codex 官方 API',
      '- 可先通过手动复制、GitHub Issue、本地任务文件或 webhook payload 传递任务'
    ].join('\n')
  : null;

return [{
  json: {
    ...$json,
    codexAdapter: {
      strategy: 'task-prompt',
      supportedTransports: ['manual_copy', 'github_issue', 'local_task_file', 'webhook_payload']
    },
    codexTaskPrompt,
    status: $json.mode === 'plan_only' ? 'planned' : 'codex_task_ready',
    nextAction: $json.mode === 'plan_only' ? 'ask_human' : 'ask_human'
  }
}];

return [{
  json: {
    status: $json.status || 'unknown',
    riskLevel: $json.riskLevel || 'unknown',
    requireHumanApproval: Boolean($json.requireHumanApproval),
    codexTaskPrompt: $json.codexTaskPrompt || null,
    review: $json.review || null,
    nextAction: $json.nextAction || ($json.blockedBySafety ? 'ask_human' : 'ask_human'),
    warnings: $json.warnings || [],
    validationErrors: $json.validationErrors || [],
    planner: $json.taskBreakdown
      ? {
          taskBreakdown: $json.taskBreakdown,
          implementationPlan: $json.implementationPlan,
          filesLikelyAffected: $json.filesLikelyAffected,
          validationPlan: $json.validationPlan,
          rollbackPlan: $json.rollbackPlan
        }
      : null,
    codexAdapter: $json.codexAdapter || null,
    note: $json.blockedBySafety
      ? 'High-risk task blocked. Manual review is required before any execution.'
      : $json.humanApprovalPending
        ? 'Human approval is required before continuing.'
        : 'Workflow completed without automatic execution.'
  }
}];
